goals: Remove the IMAGE input and IMAGE output from `CoolEffectSelector` so it becomes a pure effect-name selector.
Ensure the frontend live preview always runs using a synthetic placeholder texture (no image connection required).
Remove the "Connect an image to preview this effect." overlay message.

userStories.title: Effect selection without image input
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user, I want to add the `CoolEffectSelector` node and immediately see the effect preview so that I can choose the right effect before wiring any image.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `CoolEffectSelector.INPUT_TYPES` does not contain an `image` key in `required` or `optional`.
Connecting the node's output to `CoolVideoGenerator.effect_name` works without any IMAGE output from the selector.

userStories.title: Built-in preview placeholder
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI user, I want the effect preview canvas to display the GLSL effect over a synthetic image immediately so that I never see a blank or gray canvas when the node is first added.

acceptanceCriteria.text: On `mount_effect_selector_widget_for_node`, `create_live_glsl_preview` is called with a programmatically generated placeholder texture (e.g. a 512×512 UV-gradient or checkerboard drawn on an offscreen canvas).
The overlay element never displays "Connect an image to preview this effect." — that message is removed entirely.
The canvas background is `transparent` (not gray) once the placeholder texture is set.
Switching effects in the dropdown updates the GLSL shader while keeping the same placeholder texture.
The placeholder is generated purely in JS — no new HTTP endpoint or Python change is required for this.

functionalRequirements.description: Add a `generate_placeholder_texture(document_ref, width=512, height=512)` function in `effect_selector.js` that draws a UV-gradient (red = U, green = V, blue = 0.5) onto an offscreen `HTMLCanvasElement` and returns a `THREE.CanvasTexture` (or equivalent texture object compatible with the existing `ShaderMaterial` uniform).
Call `generate_placeholder_texture` inside `mount_effect_selector_widget_for_node` and pass the result as `input_image` to `create_live_glsl_preview`.
Remove the conditional overlay message `"Connect an image to preview this effect."` from `update_overlay_message` in `create_live_glsl_preview`.
Set `canvas_element.style.background = "transparent"` unconditionally once the placeholder is provided (remove the `input_image ? "transparent" : "rgb(128,128,128)"` branch).
